cache.result: As of today, the exchange rate for 1 US Dollar (USD) is approximately 88.68 Indian Rupees (INR), with variations noted across different platforms. For instance, Western Union offers a special rate of 89.08 INR for 1 USD, while Remitly lists it at 88.88 INR. For the latest rates and to set alerts, you can refer to sources like Wise and XE.
